display.purpose: Top-level Today titles and major progress moments.

body.purpose: Readable native iOS body copy and controls.

shadows.name: raised-control
shadows.purpose: Separate a control from its surface when tonal layering is insufficient.

shadows.name: focused-sheet
shadows.purpose: Provide structure for a focused sheet or transient surface.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default timing for buttons, selection, and routine state changes.

motion.name: routine-complete
motion.purpose: Make one-tap completion satisfying without delaying the workflow.

components.name: Routine Row
components.description: A fast one-tap todo row for a skincare step.
components.css: .routine-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 12px 16px; min-height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(0.965 0.012 220); color: oklch(0.205 0.025 220); } .routine-row button { min-width: 44px; min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(0.420 0.105 220); color: oklch(0.955 0.010 220); transition: transform 180ms ease-out, opacity 180ms ease-out; } .routine-row button:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

narrative.overview: A calm, well-organized bathroom counter in soft morning light: familiar, useful, and carefully arranged without looking precious. The product is a tracking and todo experience first. Warmth comes from clear hierarchy and tactile completion feedback rather than beauty advertising or decoration.

rules.name: The One Useful Accent Rule
rules.body: Petroleum blue marks an action, a selected state, or meaningful progress. It is not background decoration.

rules.name: The Native Reading Rule
rules.body: Use iOS text styles and let the system remain the dominant typographic voice.

rules.name: The Quiet Surface Rule
rules.body: A routine row should be easy to scan at rest. Elevation appears only to clarify layering or a state change.

dos: Do make the next action obvious.
Do use native iOS structure and safe areas.
Do support light and dark mode.
donts: Don't make the app strongly masculine, strongly feminine, or beauty-coded.
Don't make it medical or anxiety-inducing.
Don't use decorative motion without state meaning.
Don't communicate status through color alone.
